description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 26th, a test vehicle operating with the automated driving system engaged was traveling Eastbound on Interstate 580 in Castro 
Valley when a nearby semi-trailer truck merging from Interstate 238 generated a draft that projected road debris onto the test vehicle. No 
injuries were reported and law enforcement was not called to the scene. The test vehicle sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
